evidenceBoundary: Planning handoff plus current-session before-fix reproduction only. Planned regression rows carry no pass claim until implementation and independent test execute them.
noSecretNetworkAssumptions: All mutation tests run in isolated operating-system temporary Git repositories.
Synthetic dates and non-secret narrative strings replace real credentials or market claims.
True external fetch and Copilot boundaries use deterministic local stubs.
No production repository, network, monitoring, backup, release-train, or knb path is mutated.

redGreenContract.beforeFixObserved: exit 1; 496 passed, 1 failed; nextSession.sessionDate must match snapshot.nextSessionDate
redGreenContract.requiredRedTitle: Regression BUG-002: target-date rollover retains the last coherent pair when Tier B fails
redGreenContract.requiredRedBehavior: The original wrapper publishes or leaves candidate July 16 Tier A beside retained July 15 Tier B.
redGreenContract.requiredGreenBehavior: The repaired wrapper retains byte-identical July 15 snapshot payload and history, commits only permitted raw data, and passes the unchanged validator.

tests.testId: current payload satisfies the executable brief contract
tests.description: Current consumer-level reproduction of the mixed pair.

tests.testId: Regression BUG-002: target-date rollover retains the last coherent pair when Tier B fails
tests.description: Candidate Tier A advances to July 16 while retained Tier B targets July 15; original wrapper must RED and repaired wrapper must GREEN.
Same-target data-only acceptance, matching-pair advancement, retry config reset, forced validation rollback, and raw-data-only selection.
Owned dirt refuses before mutation and unrelated dirt remains byte/index/status identical.

tests.testId: Regression BUG-002: a failed rollover never serves prior-session actions beside an advanced Tier-A snapshot
tests.description: Real wrapper fixture plus real production page and renderer expose one coherent retained session after failed rollover.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/market-brief-session-date-drift.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression BUG-002: a failed rollover never serves prior-session actions beside an advanced Tier-A snapshot" --reporter=list

tests.description: Complete focused browser file over ephemeral real HTTP.
Current repaired pair satisfies the unchanged contract.
Complete repository inventory passes and parent finding is absent.
Wrapper parses and retains macOS/Linux-compatible forms.
Complete existing Playwright inventory remains green.

atomicityAssertions: Rejected rollover leaves baseline snapshot payload and history byte-identical.
Failed narrative attempt leaves baseline payload and config byte-identical before retry.
Forced validation failure leaves no owned staged path.
Same-target stale payload remains accepted only through the unchanged validator.
Matching candidate snapshot payload and history advance together.
dirtyWorktreeAssertions: Dirty owned path produces zero external-boundary invocation and zero mutation.
Unrelated dirty path does not block the owned transaction.
Unrelated dirty path bytes, index object, and status remain identical.
